name: p0-planting-space-visitor-loop
title: brainstorm: planting space visitor loop
description: Convert one default public welfare tavern into Secret Flowerbed and add a visitor-first planting loop without platform economy or visitor social trading.
creator: lijin
notes: Secret Flowerbed uses existing pw_community_repair with existing NPCs/assets. Added targeted seed refresh to remove stale repair gameplay ids from historical system JSON stores; doorway filters to the planting gameplay. Backend/frontend validation passed; browser entry verified.
